publishedAbstract: This procedure outlines the migration from **27 OSDs, 9 sets x 3 nodes OSDs (0.5TB each)** to **9 OSDs, 3 sets x 3 nodes (2TB each)**- You need to increase the capacity of each OSD to 2TB or bigger, and remove 0.5TB disks.- Because you need to reduce the total number of OSDs while increasing their size, this is a "Scale-up, Removal of each old OSD" operation.
publishedTitle: Reorganization of ODF OSDs, changing the size of OSDs
